'''shosashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:phaceloid|phaceloid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-s-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:phaceloid|phaceloid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shosashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shosashithi|shosashithi]] || [[word:shosashiji|shosashiji]] || [[word:shosashishi|shosashishi]] || [[word:shosashiki|shosashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shosashuthuthu|shosashuthuthu]] || [[word:shosashujuju|shosashujuju]] || [[word:shosashushushu|shosashushushu]] || [[word:shosashukuku|shosashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shosashuthu|shosashuthu]] || [[word:shosashuju|shosashuju]] || [[word:shosashushu|shosashushu]] || [[word:shosashuku|shosashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shosashufthuf|shosashufthuf]] || [[word:shosashufjuf|shosashufjuf]] || [[word:shosashufshuf|shosashufshuf]] || [[word:shosashufkuf|shosashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shosashethe|shosashethe]] || [[word:shosasheje|shosasheje]] || [[word:shosasheshe|shosasheshe]] || [[word:shosasheke|shosasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shosashothotho|shosashothotho]] || [[word:shosashojojo|shosashojojo]] || [[word:shosashoshosho|shosashoshosho]] || [[word:shosashokoko|shosashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shosashotho|shosashotho]] || [[word:shosashojo|shosashojo]] || [[word:shosashosho|shosashosho]] || [[word:shosashoko|shosashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shosashofthof|shosashofthof]] || [[word:shosashofjof|shosashofjof]] || [[word:shosashofshof|shosashofshof]] || [[word:shosashofkof|shosashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shosashĂŻfthĂŻf|shosashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shosashĂŻfjĂŻf|shosashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shosashĂŻfshĂŻf|shosashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shosashĂŻfkĂŻf|shosashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shosashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shosashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shosashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shosashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shosashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shosashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shosashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shosashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shosashĂŻfthĂŻf|shosashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shosashĂŻfjĂŻf|shosashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shosashĂŻfshĂŻf|shosashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shosashĂŻfkĂŻf|shosashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shosashĂŻfthĂŻf|shosashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shosashĂŻfjĂŻf|shosashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shosashĂŻfshĂŻf|shosashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shosashĂŻfkĂŻf|shosashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shosashĂŠthĂŠ|shosashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shosashĂŠjĂŠ|shosashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shosashĂŠshĂŠ|shosashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shosashĂŠkĂŠ|shosashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shosashathatha|shosashathatha]] || [[word:shosashajaja|shosashajaja]] || [[word:shosashashasha|shosashashasha]] || [[word:shosashakaka|shosashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shosashatha|shosashatha]] || [[word:shosashaja|shosashaja]] || [[word:shosashasha|shosashasha]] || [[word:shosashaka|shosashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shosashafthaf|shosashafthaf]] || [[word:shosashafjaf|shosashafjaf]] || [[word:shosashafshaf|shosashafshaf]] || [[word:shosashafkaf|shosashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shosashasha|shosashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shosashĂ«sha|shosashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shosashrosha|shosashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shosashmusha|shosashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shosashyasha|shosashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshosashnkshĂ«sha|goshosashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshosashnkrosha|goshosashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshosashnkmusha|goshosashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshosashnkyasha|goshosashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shosasashasha|shosasashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shosasashĂ«sha|shosasashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shosasashrosha|shosasashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shosasashmusha|shosasashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shosasashyasha|shosasashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshosasashnkshĂ«sha|goshosasashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshosasashnkrosha|goshosasashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshosasashnkmusha|goshosasashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshosasashnkyasha|goshosasashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shesĂŠshasha|shesĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shesĂŠshĂ«sha|shesĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shesĂŠshrosha|shesĂŠshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shesĂŠshmusha|shesĂŠshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shesĂŠshyasha|shesĂŠshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshesĂŠshnkshĂ«sha|goshesĂŠshnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshesĂŠshnkrosha|goshesĂŠshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshesĂŠshnkmusha|goshesĂŠshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshesĂŠshnkyasha|goshesĂŠshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shosfashasha|shosfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shosfashĂ«sha|shosfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shosfashrosha|shosfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shosfashmusha|shosfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shosfashyasha|shosfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshosfashnkshĂ«sha|goshosfashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshosfashnkrosha|goshosfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshosfashnkmusha|goshosfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshosfashnkyasha|goshosfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
